title: Personal super contributions
description: Deductions you can claim for personal super contributions.
keywords: personal super contributions, super contributions tax deduction, super tax deduction, super contribution tax deduction, superannuation tax deduction, superannuation contributions, super contributions, personal super contribution deduction

content_blocks.text: You may be able to claim a deduction for personal super contributions you make to a complying super fund or retirement savings account (RSA).
To claim a deduction for personal super contributions, you must first give your super fund or RSA provider a valid notice of intent and receive an acknowledgment form from them.
Before claiming a deduction for personal super contributions , you should consider the impacts on your super .
